  "findings": [
    "Kinked and flattened EMT bend reduces internal cross-sectional area",
    "Damaged conduit violates NEC requirements for maintaining internal diameter"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out and replace the damaged/kinked section of EMT conduit",
    "Re-bend a new piece of EMT using the correct size bender shoe to prevent flattening"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 358.24 requires that bends in EMT be made so that the conduit will not be damaged and the internal diameter of the conduit will not be effectively reduced. A kinked or flattened bend violates this requirement and will impede wire pulling and potentially damage conductor insulation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 358.24",
    "NEC Chapter 9"
  ]
}
